login.title: Sign in
login.name: Username
login.errorEmpty: Please enter both username and password.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.intro: Create the administrator account. This screen only appears once.
setup.adminNameHint: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, period only.
setup.sampleEntriesHint: Adds a welcome post and a default category. You can remove them later from the admin UI.
setup.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.errorInvalidName: Username contains characters that are not allowed.
setup.errorInternal: Setup failed. Please check the server log.
home.title: Dashboard
home.recent.heading: Recent entries
home.recent.empty: No entries yet. Start from New entry.
home.recent.col.title: Title
settings.title: Settings
settings.basic.error.baseUrlInvalid: Base URL must look like http(s)://host.
settings.blog.title: Title
settings.blog.baseUrlHint: Used for the absolute URLs in static builds, RSS, and Open Graph images. Trailing slash recommended.
settings.blog.llmsHint: Publishes /llms.txt + /llms-full.txt for AI agents, following the llmstxt.org conventions (index + full text).
settings.blog.autoRebuildHint: Writes the full static snapshot to SB_REBUILD_OUT on every entry / category create / update / delete. If the destination is not writable the rebuild fails silently in the log; the save itself still succeeds. The manual rebuild page is unchanged.
settings.blog.ogBgHint: Background image for the Open Graph card (1200×630). A per-entry override wins over this default; if neither is set, the embedded default ships. Off-ratio images are centre-cropped. Changing this triggers a regen of every entry's card.
settings.blog.ogTextColorHint: Text color used for the entry title and site name on the OG card.
settings.admin.hint: Per-logged-in-user preferences. Stored in the browser; other users aren't affected.
settings.admin.appearanceHint: Stored in this browser's localStorage only. Set it separately on other devices.
settings.admin.languageHint: Admin UI language. Stored in this browser (localStorage + sb_admin_lang cookie).
settings.ops.mcp.hint: Bearer tokens for remote MCP clients (Claude Desktop, LM Studio, Cursor, …) to reach POST /mcp. The raw value is shown once on creation — copy it into the client config immediately.
settings.ops.mcp.newWarn: This value is only shown on this screen. Copy it now.
settings.ops.mcp.name: Name
settings.ops.mcp.col.name: Name
settings.ops.mcp.col.author: Acts as
settings.ops.mcp.scope.hint: Checking "Write" enables entry create / update / publish. Only grant it to tokens that actually need it, e.g. an AI agent drafting or editing entries.
settings.ops.mcp.author: Acts as
settings.ops.mcp.author.hint: The user entries created or updated via this token are recorded as.
settings.ops.mcp.error.author: Invalid acts-as user.
settings.ops.mcp.revokeConfirm: Revoke this token? Existing MCP clients will disconnect immediately.
settings.ops.env.hint: These come from environment variables at startup. To change them, update the SB_* vars and restart the process.
settings.ops.audit.hint: The most recent 100 MCP write-tool calls. Like analytics, the log can be stored in a dedicated SQLite file by setting SB_MCP_AUDIT_DB (defaults to the main DB).
settings.ops.audit.col.author: Acts-as
common.col.title: Title
common.col.name: Name
entries.title: Entries
entries.heading: Entries (%d)
entries.form.slugPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the numeric ID
entries.form.keywordsPlaceholder: For the meta keywords tag. Newline or comma separated.
entries.form.ogBgHint: Background image for this entry's OG card. If unset, falls back to the blog-wide default.
entries.form.ogCardHint: Use this button to rebuild the card after changing the title or background. In CGI deployments this is the only way an OG card gets written to disk.
entries.list.title: Entries
entries.form.error.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (e.g. my-first-post).
entries.form.error.slugInUse: That slug is already in use.
pages.title: Pages
pages.list.title: Pages
pages.heading: Pages (%d)
pages.form.error.slugInvalid: Path must use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (multiple segments allowed with slashes).
pages.form.error.slugReserved: That path is reserved by the system.
pages.form.error.slugInUse: That path is already in use.
pages.form.error.slugPrefixConflict: That path is a parent or child of an existing page.
categories.title: Categories
categories.heading: Categories (%d)
categories.form.hiddenLabel: Hide from category list, archives, and feed
categories.form.hiddenHint: Entries stay reachable by their individual permalink, but drop out of every listing surface. Use it for archives kept off the main blog timeline (product pages, service notices, etc.).
categories.delete.confirm: Delete this category? Attached entries revert to uncategorized.
categories.form.error.parentSelf: A category cannot be its own parent.
categories.form.error.sortOrderInvalid: Sort order must be a number.
categories.form.error.slugInvalid: Slug must use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (e.g. travel-notes).
categories.form.error.slugInUse: That slug is already used by another category.
tags.title: Tags
tags.heading: Tags (%d)
tags.empty: No tags yet. Enter tag names on the entry form to auto-create them.
tags.col.name: Name
tags.delete.confirm: Delete this tag? All entry ↔ tag links for it are also removed.
tags.hint: Tags auto-create from entry form input. Rename or delete them here.
links.title: Links
links.heading: Links (%d)
links.delete.confirmGroup: Delete this group? Its links will become ungrouped.
links.form.name: Name
links.form.descriptionPlaceholder: Used for the anchor's title attribute
links.form.targetHint: Anchor target attribute. Usually left blank.
users.title: Users
users.heading: Users (%d)
users.form.name: Username
users.form.nameHint: Used for admin login. Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, period only.
users.form.passwordHint: Only fill these to change the password. Leave both blank to keep the current password.
users.form.selfDemoteHint: You can't change your own admin role. Ask another admin, or create a second admin first.
users.flash.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account.
users.list.title: User management
users.form.error.nameInvalid: User name must use letters, digits, hyphen, underscore or period only.
users.form.error.passwordMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
users.form.error.passwordMismatchKept: Password and confirmation do not match. The other fields were saved, but the password was not changed.
users.form.error.lastAdmin: The last administrator's role cannot be changed.
users.form.error.nameInUse: That user name is already in use.
profile.title: Profile
profile.hint: Every role can edit their own profile.
profile.form.title: Edit profile
profile.form.error.nameInvalid: User name must use letters, digits, underscore, hyphen or period only.
profile.form.error.nameInUse: That user name is already in use.
profile.form.error.passwordMismatchKept: Password and confirmation do not match. The profile was saved, but the password was not changed.
profile.ai.heading: AI writing assist
profile.ai.hint: LLM configuration used by rewrite, title / tag suggest, and image alt-text generation.
profile.ai.secretMissing: AI features are disabled because the SB_AI_SECRET env var isn't set on this server. Ask your administrator to configure it.
profile.ai.secretIsDefault.admin: Security warning: SB_AI_SECRET is still set to the placeholder value from .env.example. That value is public, so saved API keys are effectively decryptable by anyone. Replace it with a long random string and restart the server. Rotating the secret invalidates every saved API key, so users will need to re-enter theirs.
profile.ai.secretIsDefault.user: Security warning: this server's SB_AI_SECRET is still the example default. Any API key you save here is not securely encrypted. Ask your administrator to rotate SB_AI_SECRET.
profile.ai.enabled.label: Turn AI features on
profile.ai.providerHint: OpenAI-compat covers OpenAI itself plus LM Studio / Ollama in compat mode.
profile.ai.apiKeyPlaceholder: sk-... / leave blank for local endpoints
profile.ai.apiKeyHint: Leave blank on save to keep the existing key.
profile.ai.autoAlt.label: Generate alt text on image upload
profile.ai.timeoutHint: Per-call ceiling. Leave empty for the default (compose 120 s, alt-text 45 s). Override with an integer 1–600 — useful for local thinking models or slow CPU inference.
profile.ai.error.unconfigured: Can't save: SB_AI_SECRET is not set on this server.
profile.ai.error.encrypt: Failed to encrypt the API key.
profile.ai.error.key_required: Claude provider requires an API key.
js.ai.contextRequired: Nothing before the cursor to continue from.
js.ai.err.unauthorized: API key rejected by the provider (401).
js.ai.err.rate_limited: Rate limit hit. Try again in a moment.
js.ai.err.provider_error: The AI provider returned an error.
js.ai.err.reasoning_exhausted: The reasoning model used the entire token budget on hidden chain-of-thought. Raise Max Tokens or pick a non-thinking model.

customTags.list.empty: No custom tags yet. Add one using the form below.

customTags.edit.heading: Edit Custom Tag

customTags.form.valueHint.named: Expands as %s in templates. Raw HTML is allowed.
customTags.form.valueHint.empty: Expands inside templates. Raw HTML is allowed.
customTags.error.invalidName: Invalid tag name. Use lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only after the custom_ prefix.
customTags.error.duplicate: A custom tag with that name already exists.
templates.og.heading: OG Card
templates.og.hint: Defaults for the Open Graph card (1200×630). Per-entry overrides win when set. Changing the background or text colour regenerates every entry's card.

templates.col.name: Name
templates.flash.activeCannotDelete: Can't delete the active template. Switch the active flag to another template first.
templates.col.name: Name
templates.heading: Templates (%d)

templates.form.lint.sectionWarn: Contains tags / blocks the Go port doesn't populate. See the Template status panel.

templates.form.assetsHint: Referenced from HTML/CSS via the {site_parts} prefix.
templates.settings.heading: Template pins
templates.settings.error.dateFormatSaveF: Could not save the date format.
templates.settings.error.displayCountSav: Could not save the display count.
templates.settings.archiveHint: Used for year / month / category archive pages. Picking the active template renders them with the same skin as regular pages.
templates.settings.hint: Pick a template for these pages. When unset, the active template is used.
templates.settings.dateHint: Available tokens: %Year% / %Mon% / %Day% / %Hour% / %Min% / %Week% / %WeekLong% / %MonLong% / %MonShort% / %DayOrd% / %Hour12% / %HourAP% / %Sec% / %Zone%. Leave blank to use the default.
templates.settings.date.listUnusedNote: Inline date appended to each <li> inside the sidebar list widgets ({latest_entry_list} / {recent_comment_list}). SB3 default is (%Mon%/%Day%) with the leading space + parens included. The {entry_date} tag on list pages is governed by the “Entry date” setting above.
templates.settings.display.perPageHint: Used on the home, category, tag, and archive list pages.
templates.import.heading: Import a template
templates.import.hint: Accepts the SB3 template export format (multipart/mixed template.txt). base.html is required; style.css / entry.html / image assets are optional.
templates.import.dropZone: Drop template.txt here or click to select
templates.import.title: Import template
templates.og.title: Design: OG card

templates.form.error.entryBodyParse: Failed to parse the per-entry HTML: %v

comments.actions.approve.title: Approve

comments.settings.spamWords.hint: Comments containing any of these terms are silently dropped. Case-insensitive substring match.
comments.settings.ipBlacklist.hint: One IP or CIDR per line. Matching comments are silently dropped. Lines starting with # are comments.

analytics.top.sortHint: Click a column header to sort

js.field.author: Author
rebuild.title: Build
rebuild.hint: Writes the whole site as static HTML. Set SB_REBUILD_OUT to change the output directory.
rebuild.trailingHint: Run this after publishing or editing entries to write a fresh static copy under %s. If you only serve dynamically, rebuilding is optional.
rebuild.error.busy: Another rebuild is already running. Please wait a moment and try again.
settings.ops.mcp.error.nameTooLong: Token name must be 100 characters or fewer.
webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.heading: Subscriptions
webhooks.hint: POST JSON to your URL when events happen — entry publishes, comment arrivals, image uploads. Wire up Slack, Discord, Zapier, n8n.
webhooks.list.empty: No webhooks yet. Click "New webhook" to add one.
webhooks.delete.confirm: Delete this webhook and its delivery history?
webhooks.tested: Test event dispatched. See the delivery log below for the result.
webhooks.new.heading: New webhook
webhooks.edit.heading: Edit webhook
webhooks.form.urlHint: https:// or http://. Private network destinations (127.0.0.1, 10.x, 192.168.x, ...) are not allowed.
webhooks.form.secret.optional: (optional) only set if you want HMAC verification
webhooks.form.secret.kept: (leave empty to keep the stored secret)
webhooks.form.secret.hint: When set, payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 and the signature ships in the X-SB-Signature header.
webhooks.event.entry.updated: When a published entry is updated
webhooks.event.comment.received: When a comment is received (incl. waiting)
webhooks.error.urlInvalid: URL is malformed or points to a destination we refuse to call.
webhooks.error.eventsRequired: Pick at least one event to send.
webhooks.error.limit: You can register at most 50 webhooks.
webhooks.format.envelope.hint: Send the full nested envelope as-is: id / event / timestamp / weblog / data... Suits self-hosted receivers and any middleware (Zapier / n8n / Make) that can parse arbitrary JSON.
webhooks.format.flat.hint: Flatten nested keys with "_" into a single-level object (e.g. data.title → data_title, data.tags[0] → data_tags_0). The payload also carries a human-readable summary under "text" (Slack) and "content" (Discord) at the top level, so a single subscription works for Slack Incoming Webhooks, Discord Incoming Webhooks, and Slack Workflow Builder's webhook trigger.
webhooks.deliveries.title: Delivery log
webhooks.deliveries.retention: Only the most recent 200 attempts are kept; older rows are removed periodically.
